creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks.

Given these findings, I'll close this as WONTFIX as it's an upstream issue and upstream has abandoned the 5.x branch in favor of its 6.x branch, ported separately as databases/db6.

Please reopen if someone is willing to contact Oracle AND have seen that they have patches available for this issue,

OR

someone provides ready-to-use patches that I can add after review without further changes.

Otherwise, we'll just live with the broken upstream code.
